title: SOTA Watch Configuration Schema
description: Schema for .sota-watch.json files in consuming projects. Defines which global SOTA topics a project wants to track, with priority and keywords.

project.description: Project name. Used for discovery filtering and audit logs.

version.description: Config version (semver). Defaults to '1.0' if omitted.

topics.description: Array of SOTA topics this project wants to track.

category.description: SOTA category for rubric weighting. Must match one of 9 canonical categories.

keywords.description: Optional project-specific keywords to override global.json keywords. Used in discovery queries.

priority.description: Priority level (1=low, 5=high). Controls re-eval frequency. Higher = more frequently scanned.

notes.description: Project-specific context for this topic (e.g., 'critical for Q2 roadmap', 'research spike').

trigger_on_session_start.description: If true, run session-start delta-check against watched topics. Defaults to true.

max_candidates_per_topic.description: Hard cap on candidates returned per topic in discovery scans. Defaults to 20.

score_threshold_study.description: Minimum score for STUDY recommendation (default 70). Overrides rubric default.

score_threshold_install.description: Minimum score for INSTALL recommendation (default 80). Overrides rubric default.

topics.notes: Critical: MCP gap analysis for ecosystem.
Covers deepwiki, repomix-mcp, octocode for repo analysis.
